title: Durga Chalisa
intro: Durga Chalisa is a hymn honoring Goddess Durga
description:
॥ Doha ॥

Ya devi sarvabhuteshu shaktirupena samsthita.
Namastasyai namastasyai, namastasyai namo namah.||

॥ Chaupai ॥

Namo namo durge sukh karni.
Namo namo ambe duhkh harni.||

Nirankar hai jyoti tumhari.
Tihun lok phaili ujiyari.||

Shashi lalat mukh mahavishala.
Netra lal bhrukuti vikarala.||

Rupa matu ko adhik suhave.
Darash karat jan ati sukh pave.||

Tum sansar shakti lai kina.
Palan hetu anna dhan dina.||

Annapurna hui jag pala.
Tum hi adi sundari bala.||

Pralayakal sab nashan hari.
Tum gauri shivshankar pyari.||

Shiv yogi tumhre gun gave.
Brahma vishnu tumhein nit dhyave.||

Rupa saraswati ko tum dhara.
De subuddhi rishi munin ubara.||

Dharayo rupa narsingh ko amba.
Pargat bhai phadkar khamba.||

Raksha kari prahlad bachayo.
Hiranyaksh ko swarg pathayo.||

Lakshmi rupa dharo jag mahi.
Shri narayan ang samahi.||

Kshirsindhu mein karat vilasa.
Dayasindhu dijai man asa.||

Hinglaj mein tumhi bhavani.
Mahima amit na jat bakhani.||

Matangi dhumavati mata.
Bhuvaneshwari bagala sukh data.||

Shri bhairavi tara jag tarini.
Chhinna bhal bhava duhkh nivarini.||

Kehari vahan sohe bhavani.
Langur veer chalat agavani.||

Kar mein khappar khadga virajai.
Jako dekh kaal dar bhajai.||

Sohai astra aur trishula.
Jate uthat shatru hiya shula.||

Nagarkot mein tumhi virajat.
Tihunlok mein danka bajat.||

Shumbh nishumbh danav tum mare.
Raktbeej shankhan sanhare.||

Mahishasur nrip ati abhimani.
Jehi agh bhar mahi akulani.||

Rupa karal kalika dhara.
Sen sahit tum tihi sanhara.||

Pari gadh santan par jab jab.
Bhai sahay matu tum tab tab.||

Amarpuri aru basav loka.
Tav mahima sab rahe ashoka.||

Jwala mein hai jyoti tumhari.
Tumhein sada pujen nar-nari.||

Prem bhakti se jo yash gave.
Duhkh daridra nikat nahin ave.||

Dhyave tumhein jo nar man layi.
Janm-maran takau chhuti jayi.||

Jogi sur muni kahat pukari.
Yoga na ho bin shakti tumhari.||

Shankar acharaj tap kino.
Kaam krodh jiti sab lino.||

Nishidin dhyan dharo shankar ko.
Kahu kaal nahin sumiro tumko.||

Shakti rupa ka maram na payo.
Shakti gayi tab man pachhitayo.||

Sharanagat hui kirti bakhani.
Jai jai jai jagadamb bhavani.||

Bhai prasanna adi jagadamba.
Dai shakti nahin keen vilamba.||

Moko matu kasht ati ghero.
Tum bin kaun harai duhkh mero.||

Asha trishna nipat satavein.
Moh madadik sab binsavein.||

Shatru nash kijai maharani.
Sumirau ek chit tumhein bhavani.||

Karo kripa he matu dayala.
Riddhi-siddhi dai karahu nihala.

Jab lagi jiun daya phal paun.
Tumharau yash main sada sunaun.||

Durga chalisa jo koi gave.
Sab sukh bhog parampad pave.||

Devidas sharan nij jani.
Karahu kripa jagadamb bhavani.||

॥ Doha ॥

Sharanagat raksha kar, bhakt rahe nishank.
Main aaya teri sharan mein, matu lijiye ank.
meaning:
॥ Doha ॥

Ya devi sarvabhuteshu shaktirupena samsthita.
To the Goddess who resides in all beings in the form of Power (Shakti),
Namastasyai namastasyai, namastasyai namo namah.||
I bow to Her, I bow to Her, I bow to Her again and again.

॥ Chaupai ॥

Namo namo durge sukh karni.
Salutations to Durga, who brings happiness.
Namo namo ambe duhkh harni.||
Salutations to Ambe, who removes all sorrows.

Nirankar hai jyoti tumhari.
Your light is formless and infinite.
Tihun lok phaili ujiyari.||
Spreading brightness throughout the three worlds.

Shashi lalat mukh mahavishala.
The crescent moon adorns your forehead, your face is magnificent.
Netra lal bhrukuti vikarala.||
Your eyes are red, and your brows are fierce.

Rupa matu ko adhik suhave.
Your form is exceptionally beautiful, Mother.
Darash karat jan ati sukh pave.||
The devotees find immense joy upon beholding you.

Tum sansar shakti lai kina.
You created the universe with your power.
Palan hetu anna dhan dina.||
And provided grain and wealth for our sustenance.

Annapurna hui jag pala.
As Annapurna, you nourished the world.
Tum hi adi sundari bala.||
You are the Primordial Beautiful Maiden.

Pralayakal sab nashan hari.
At the time of dissolution, you destroy everything.
Tum gauri shivshankar pyari.||
You are Gauri, the beloved of Lord Shiva.

Shiv yogi tumhre gun gave.
The yogi Shiva sings your praises.
Brahma vishnu tumhein nit dhyave.||
Brahma and Vishnu meditate upon you constantly.

Rupa saraswati ko tum dhara.
You assumed the form of Saraswati.
De subuddhi rishi munin ubara.||
And bestowed wisdom to save the sages.

Dharayo rupa narsingh ko amba.
You took the form of Narasingha (the Man-Lion).
Pargat bhai phadkar khamba.||
And appeared by tearing apart the pillar.

Raksha kari prahlad bachayo.
You protected Prahlad and saved him.
Hiranyaksh ko swarg pathayo.||
And sent Hiranyakashipu to heaven (liberation).

Lakshmi rupa dharo jag mahi.
You assumed the form of Lakshmi in this world.
Shri narayan ang samahi.||
Residing within the body of Lord Narayana.

Kshirsindhu mein karat vilasa.
You dwell in the Ocean of Milk (Kshirsagar).
Dayasindhu dijai man asa.||
O Ocean of Compassion, please fulfill the desires of my mind.

Hinglaj mein tumhi bhavani.
You are the Goddess Bhavani in Hinglaj.
Mahima amit na jat bakhani.||
Your glory is infinite and beyond description.

Matangi dhumavati mata.
You are Matangi and Dhumavati Mother.
Bhuvaneshwari bagala sukh data.||
Bhuvaneshwari and Bagalamukhi, the giver of happiness.

Shri bhairavi tara jag tarini.
You are Shri Bhairavi, the savior of the world (Tara).
Chhinna bhal bhava duhkh nivarini.||
And Chhinnamasta, who removes the sorrows of existence.

Kehari vahan sohe bhavani.
You ride the lion, O Bhavani.
Langur veer chalat agavani.||
With Hanuman (Langur Veer) walking ahead to welcome you.

Kar mein khappar khadga virajai.
In your hands, you hold the skull-cup and the sword.
Jako dekh kaal dar bhajai.||
Seeing which, the god of death (Kaal) flees in fear.

Sohai astra aur trishula.
You are adorned with weapons and the trident.
Jate uthat shatru hiya shula.||
Which causes the hearts of enemies to tremble with fear.

Nagarkot mein tumhi virajat.
You reside in Nagarkot.
Tihunlok mein danka bajat.||
And your fame resonates throughout the three worlds.

Shumbh nishumbh danav tum mare.
You killed the demons Shumbh and Nishumbh.
Raktbeej shankhan sanhare.||
And destroyed the army of Raktbeej.

Mahishasur nrip ati abhimani.
The arrogant King Mahishasura.
Jehi agh bhar mahi akulani.||
Whose sinful burden made the earth suffer.

Rupa karal kalika dhara.
You assumed the terrifying form of Kalika.
Sen sahit tum tihi sanhara.||
And destroyed him along with his entire army.

Pari gadh santan par jab jab.
Whenever the saints were in deep trouble.
Bhai sahay matu tum tab tab.||
You, Mother, always came to their aid.

Amarpuri aru basav loka.
In the city of gods and the realms of Indra.
Tav mahima sab rahe ashoka.||
Everyone remains free from sorrow due to your glory.

Jwala mein hai jyoti tumhari.
Your divine light shines in the Jwalamukhi temple.
Tumhein sada pujen nar-nari.||
And men and women worship you forever.

Prem bhakti se jo yash gave.
Those who sing your praises with love and devotion.
Duhkh daridra nikat nahin ave.||
Poverty and sorrow never come near them.

Dhyave tumhein jo nar man layi.
Whoever meditates upon you with a focused mind.
Janm-maran takau chhuti jayi.||
Is freed from the cycle of birth and death.

Jogi sur muni kahat pukari.
The sages and gods proclaim loudly.
Yoga na ho bin shakti tumhari.||
That no Yoga is successful without your power.

Shankar acharaj tap kino.
Shankaracharya performed deep penance.
Kaam krodh jiti sab lino.||
And conquered lust, anger, and all passions.

Nishidin dhyan dharo shankar ko.
He meditated upon Lord Shiva day and night.
Kahu kaal nahin sumiro tumko.||
But never remembered You.

Shakti rupa ka maram na payo.
He could not understand the mystery of your power.
Shakti gayi tab man pachhitayo.||
And when his power waned, he felt regret.

Sharanagat hui kirti bakhani.
He sought refuge and sang your praises.
Jai jai jai jagadamb bhavani.||
Victory, Victory, Victory to you, O Mother Bhavani!

Bhai prasanna adi jagadamba.
The Primordial Mother became pleased.
Dai shakti nahin keen vilamba.||
And granted him power without delay.

Moko matu kasht ati ghero.
O Mother, I am surrounded by great misery.
Tum bin kaun harai duhkh mero.||
Who else but you can remove my suffering?

Asha trishna nipat satavein.
Worldly desires and attachments torment me.
Moh madadik sab binsavein.||
All illusions and ego are fading away.

Shatru nash kijai maharani.
Destroy my enemies, O Great Queen.
Sumirau ek chit tumhein bhavani.||
I remember you with single-minded devotion, O Bhavani.

Karo kripa he matu dayala.
Show your grace, O compassionate Mother.
Riddhi-siddhi dai karahu nihala.||
Bless me with wealth and success and make me happy.

Jab lagi jiun daya phal paun.
As long as I live, may I receive the fruits of your compassion.
Tumharau yash main sada sunaun.||
And may I always sing of your glory.

Durga chalisa jo koi gave.
Whoever sings this Durga Chalisa.
Sab sukh bhog parampad pave.||
Enjoys all happiness and attains the supreme state.

Devidas sharan nij jani.
Devidas seeks refuge in you, knowing you as his own.
Karahu kripa jagadamb bhavani.||
Show your grace, O Jagadamba Bhavani.

॥ Doha ॥

Sharanagat raksha kar, bhakt rahe nishank.
Protect those who seek your refuge, so that the devotee remains fearless.
Main aaya teri sharan mein, matu lijiye ank.||
I have come under your shelter, O Mother, please embrace me.
